title: Split Decision cue sheet
description: episodes/{case_id}/cue_sheet.json — the derived timing view for the Phaser player and video export, written by the Producer's timestamp pass. Ordered by t ascending. Spans both streams: `stream` says which file `event_index` points into (events.jsonl or studio_events.jsonl). The player consumes cue sheet + events; it never re-derives timing.

event_index.description: 0-based line index into the stream's .jsonl file
